description_long: This nightstand features a modern, minimalist design with rounded edges and a smooth, beige exterior. The front face includes a single wide drawer with two rectangular metallic handles, set beneath an open shelf space that provides additional storage or display area. The drawer front is finished in a contrasting black, while the shelf and drawer interior appear to be made of a lighter wood or wood-like material. The nightstand stands on four short, outward-angled wooden legs, giving it a slightly elevated profile. The overall construction suggests a sturdy build, with a seamless, continuous outer shell and no visible decorative elements. Its clean lines and neutral color palette make it suitable for contemporary urban interiors.
description: A modern beige nightstand with rounded edges, a wide black-fronted drawer, open shelf, and short angled wooden legs. Its minimalist design is both functional and stylish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open shelf, wide black drawer with two metallic handles, and angled legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the smooth, rounded beige exterior and the profile of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain, unadorned beige back with no visible openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the smooth, rounded beige exterior and leg profile.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
